arts.ttl: How Liverpool plan to honour Diogo Jota on a hugely emotional afternoon at Deepdale, writes DOMINIC KING
arts.sum: DOMINIC KING: When the pre-season fixture against Preston was announced, it was anticipated it would be a joyous affair and the first opportunity for fans to see the newly-crowned champions.

arts.ttl: Wirtz decision: How Reds could line up against Preston on Sunday
arts.sum: Sports Mole takes an in-depth look at how Liverpool could line up for Sunday’s pre-season clash with Preston North End.
